datasets.name: ESC-50
datasets.description: Environmental Sound Classification - 2000 clips across 50 classes (5s each, 44.1kHz WAV)

datasets.name: BLEBeacon Dataset (sample)
datasets.description: BLE beacon RSSI traces from university building - 10K checkin + 10K RSSI CSV samples

queued.name: COCO val2017
queued.description: 5K images, 80 object classes (person, vehicle, animal). Standard YOLO benchmark.

queued.name: Market-1501
queued.description: 32,668 bboxes of 1,501 identities from 6 cameras. Standard ReID benchmark for cross-camera person tracking.

queued.name: PNNL Parking Lot
queued.description: 1080p parking lot surveillance footage with pedestrians and vehicles. 2 sequences, 2500 total frames.

queued.name: PETS2009
queued.description: Surveillance-style pedestrian tracking from fixed cameras. Closest to our deployment scenario.

queued.name: MOT20
queued.description: Crowded scene tracking: 2M+ bboxes, 3833 tracks, up to 246 pedestrians/frame. Indoor+outdoor, day+night.

queued.name: MOT17
queued.description: Multi-camera pedestrian tracking with ground truth bounding boxes.

queued.name: UA-DETRAC
queued.description: 100 videos from 24 real roads, 140K+ frames, 1.21M vehicle bboxes. Sunny/rainy/cloudy/night.

queued.name: VIRAT Ground 2.0
queued.description: 8.6 hours HD surveillance video across 16 scenes. Person+vehicle activities. THE surveillance benchmark.

queued.name: BDD100K 10K subset
queued.description: 10K driving video subset with detection, tracking, segmentation, lane, drivable area labels.

queued.name: KITTI Tracking (left color)
queued.description: Synchronized stereo camera + LiDAR + GPS/IMU driving data. Selective download by sensor type.

queued.name: Waymo Open (Perception subset)
queued.description: 2030 segments with synchronized cameras + LiDAR. Highest quality but very large. Selective download possible.

device_intelligence.description: Lookup databases maintained in tritium-lib and tritium-edge, not in data/library

databases.name: BLE Company IDs
databases.note: BT SIG has 3000+ assigned IDs; we cover top 130

databases.name: Apple Continuity Types
databases.note: No auto-update; may miss iOS 19+ types

data_gaps.name: WiFi BSSID Geolocation DB
data_gaps.description: No local WiFi geolocation database. MLS shut down 2024. WiGLE API requires key.
data_gaps.recommended_action: Build local SQLite cache via WiGLE API + self-collected wardriving data

data_gaps.name: WiFi Probe Request Fingerprints
data_gaps.description: No database mapping probe request patterns to device types/OS versions
data_gaps.recommended_action: Research Satori (p0f-like for WiFi) and build fingerprint DB

data_gaps.name: BLE Company IDs Expansion
data_gaps.description: 130 of 3000+ BT SIG company IDs mapped
data_gaps.recommended_action: Import from bluetooth-SIG assigned_numbers YAML or NordicSemiconductor DB

data_gaps.name: Person ReID Test Data
data_gaps.description: No person re-identification dataset for cross-camera tracking validation

data_gaps.name: Vehicle Tracking Video
data_gaps.description: No dedicated vehicle tracking dataset for benchmarking
data_gaps.recommended_action: Download UA-DETRAC (~10 GB) or KITTI tracking subset (~15 GB)

data_gaps.name: Surveillance Video Benchmark
data_gaps.description: No multi-camera surveillance video for testing sensor fusion across camera feeds
data_gaps.recommended_action: Download VIRAT Ground 2.0 (~35 GB) — most relevant dataset for Tritium's use case
